title: Set of 5 Amber Old French Apothecary Glass With Lid Chemist Botanical Jar Stem Storage Large & Small Bottles Home Decorative Candle Jar
features: This set of five Old French apothecary glass bottles captures the timeless elegance of vintage French pharmacy decor.
Each bottle is crafted from high-quality glass in a rich mocca hue, offering a warm, earthy tone that adds sophistication to any space.
The bottles are designed with a classic, cylindrical shape, reminiscent of those used in traditional apothecaries, and are topped with matching lids that provide a secure seal.
Their antique-inspired design adds a touch of old-world charm to kitchens, bathrooms, or living areas.
This can be used to store Oils, Bath Salts, Medicines and Fragrances.
description: Set of 5 Old French Apothecary Glass Jars with Lids – Mocca by Chic Antique. Designed with a charming vintage touch, these elegant glass jars bring timeless French apothecary aesthetics into your living space. Whether used for botanical storage, displaying dried flowers, or organizing kitchen essentials, these decorative jars make a stunning statement in any room.
